name: SOAP - ECC FI Document Posting (Failure)
description: Simulates the ECC FI posting SOAP service returning a SOAP Fault. Use to test CPI fault handling.

config.response_body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><soap:Fault><faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode><faultstring>POSTING_FAILED: Company code 1000 does not exist</faultstring><detail><n0:BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POSTResponse xmlns:n0="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions"><RETURN><item><TYPE>E</TYPE><ID>RW</ID><NUMBER>011</NUMBER><MESSAGE>Company code 1000 does not exist</MESSAGE></item></RETURN></n0:BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POSTResponse></detail></soap:Fault></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>
